title: Fix operator loop done-without-commit false positive
problem: operator_loop.ticket_has_implementation_commit only greps commit messages for the ticket id. ticket-043 landed on main as cc1c17c with message 'Extend safety auditor to validate data exports' (no ticket-043 substring), so plan mode falsely reports done_without_implementation_commit drift.
acceptance_criteria: ticket_has_implementation_commit returns true when tickets/{id}.json exists on main even if the commit message omits the ticket id.
ticket-043 no longer triggers done_without_implementation_commit on a clean main tree.
Unit tests cover both message-grep and ticket-json-on-main paths.
non_goals: Do not auto-merge, push, or edit TICKET_QUEUE beyond this ticket row.
Do not change principal audit gate cadence logic.
rollback_plan: Revert ticket-046 branch; operator loop reverts to message-only grep.
